input.original_prompt: Act as an expert Cloud Architect. I need you to write a comprehensive design document and a Python script that will deploy my FastAPI application to Kubernetes on AWS EKS. Input:

Ensure that the script handles VPC creation, IAM roles, and sets up a Load Balancer. Must be under 500 words and use strict security practices. Do not use plain text secrets.
